name: Light Pill #2 - The Dream Weaver
description: The Dream Weaver - A glowing capsule that reveals the fabric of dreams to those who dare to sleep with open eyes. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Silver-threaded robe that shifts in the light
Crystal spindle that spins light into thread
Floating islands in a star-filled void
Reality is just a dream we all agree to have.
You must weave three threads from moonlight and whisper a forgotten memory into each knot. The pattern you create will become someone's dream tonight.

properties.ai_prompt: Ethereal fashion editorial of The Dream Weaver floating in a star-filled void, wearing a silver-threaded robe that shifts and flows, holding a crystal spindle that spins light into glowing threads. Twilight Mist aura with Flowing Silk energy, floating islands in the background, dreamlike atmosphere, cinematic lighting that makes everything appear both solid and translucent, 8K, hyperdetailed.
